"[49] 61-S2 LL - OLD PRIEST IS CLOSED W/ CORDS AT TOP - ADVS CT CAN OPEN NEW PRIEST"
"[47] 61-S2 CT CAN OPEN OLD PRIEST BOTH DIECTIONS "
"[46] CALTRANS ADVS AFFIRM WILL CLOSE TOP OF OLD PRIEST/SR120 ONCE READY"
"[45] 1039 CALTRANS WILL CHECK AND CALL BACK TO ADVS"
"[44] 61-S2 REQG CHECK W/CALTRANS SEE IF THEY COULD CLOSE AT THE TOP OLD PRIEST/SR120 ONCE NEW PRIEST IS OPENED"
"[40] 61-S2 FIRE IS ALMOST OUT BUT FOR EVACUATIONS // PPL CAN COME WB SR120 DOWN NEW PRIEST AND OUT"
"[39] 61-S2 WB SR120 // THEY CAN LEAVE OPEN // JUST CLOSE EB"
"[35] PER MRI SO NB 49 NEAR OLD HYWY PARTIAL LN BLKG // CDF AND MRI SO 97"
"[34] CT ADV THEY HAVE THE CLOSURE IN PLACE WB SR120 AT BIG OAK FLAT AND CLOSURE EB SR120 AT 49 WILL BE IN PLACE MOMENTARILY"

"[33] 61-S2 SPOKE W/ CT SUP // SENDING OUT CREW TO SHUT DOWN SR120/SR49 ON THE WEST SIDE AND SR120/MINERS MART ON THE EAST SIDE // ONLY THING OPEN IS WB TRFC EVACUATING FRM THE SCENE // OLD PREIST/NEW PRIEST CLOSE"
"[29] TUO SO REQ C/T TO CLOSE EB 120 AT OLD PRIEST [Shared]"
"[28] A61-004 SPOKE W/ CT SUP ON SCENE // UNK WHERE THAT FIRE TRK IS [Shared]"
"[26] FIRE TK #4403 REQ CHP MAKE CONT [Shared]"
"[22] A61-004 HAVE THE TOP OF OLD PRIEST BLOCKED AND DIVERTED [Shared]"
"[20] [Notification] [CHP]-PER CDF, NEED TO CLOSE DOWN NEW PRIEST // ONE WAY TRFC DOWN NEW PRIEST GRADE FOR EVACUATION ONLY [Shared]"
"[18] PER TUOSO FIRE HOSES 1125 //ANY INCOMING VEHS NEED TO USE NEW PRIEST [Shared]"
"[17] SO WANTS TRFC STOPPED TO THE GRADE - ADV'D HIM LN 9 AND 11 [Shared]"
"[14] A61-004 LOOKS LIKE IT WAS 1124 ON RHS WHEN IT CAUGHT FIRE [Shared]"
"[13] A61-004 VEH IS 1124 // FIRE WORKING ON THE HILLSIDE NOW [Shared]"
"[11] A61-004 97 GETTING VEHS OFF THE GRADE NOW [Shared]"

"[3] FIRE NEAR THE PARK / VERY WINDY / BLK SMOKE"
"[3] OCC'D Benton Rd / Winchester Rd SR79 / 115-31"
"[1] RP IN BLK HYUN PALISADE VS WHI FORD VN / BOTH PARTIES NOW IN PLOT"
"[1] BLK HARD PIECE OF PLASTIC BWTN CD / 1"
"[6] NOW REPORTED SB 805 TO 94 CON // RP ADVSD WHI/TAN DOG WAS HIT and IT ENDED UP IN CD // UNK IF STILL ALIVE // DID NOT SEE WHO HIT IT [Shared]"
